form.formComment: Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only one run when ran last of 9 at Tamworth Cge Mdn-Sw on August 15 over 1200m, 36 len behind Dartbrook with 59kg at $41. Might be better off following this run.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up 2nd of 7 at this track Mdn-Sw on February 19 over 1006m, 3.5 len behind Rich Star carrying 58.5kg at $4.40. Second run from a spell held ground to the line 3rd of 9 at Gold Coast Mdn on March 21 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind On The Throne carrying 56.5kg at $7. Sure to be tough to beat from the low gate.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and bumped Lean Warrior. Raced wide without cover throughout.
Shortly after the start shifted out and bumped Major Freestone.
Bumped on jumping. Near the 700m, carried in onto Scriptus Vivace.

form.formComment: First starter by Jabali out of Adequate. Ran third at Grafton at her only trial on March 15. Inside barrier will assist chances. Stays in the mix from the inside gate.
